zh.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir於1105年出生在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯。她於1120年之前與GilleBride MacGille Adomnan在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1164年6月4日在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir was born in 1105, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. She married GilleBride MacGille Adomnan before 1120, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 4 June 1164, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir est née en 1105, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse. Elle a épousé GilleBride MacGille Adomnan avant 1120, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1164, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir wurde 1105 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland geboren. Sie hat vor 1120 in Scotland GilleBride MacGille Adomnan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1164 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir è nata il nel 1105 nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Lei sposato GilleBride MacGille Adomnan prima del 1120, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1164, nel Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottirは1105年にスコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで生まれた。1120年以前にスコットランドでGilleBride MacGille Adomnanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1164年6月4日にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで59歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir(은)는 1105년 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1120년 이전 스컷랜드에서 GilleBride MacGille Adomnan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1164년 6월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir nasceu em 1105, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Ela casou-se com GilleBride MacGille Adomnan antes 1120, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1164, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir родилась в 1105 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени GilleBride MacGille Adomnan перед 1120 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 июня 1164 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Ellen Sigurdsdottir nació en 1105, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Se casó con GilleBride MacGille Adomnan antes de 1120, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1164, en Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
